title: SkillXT Reward Program Platform Overview
purpose: To provide an overview of the SkillXT Reward Program platform, its core components, user roles, and value proposition.
keyTopics: Digital loyalty platform for customer-merchant engagement
Three distinct user roles: Customer, Merchant, Super Admin
Points-based reward system with earning, redemption, and transfer capabilities
QR code-based customer identification at merchants
Subscription-based merchant access with tiered plans
Real-time notification system via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Comprehensive audit logging for all platform actions
PostgreSQL database with Prisma ORM backend
exampleQuestions: What is SkillXT Reward Program?
SkillXT platform ka overview kya hai?
How does the loyalty program work?
What are the different user roles in SkillXT?
Can I use SkillXT as both a customer and merchant?
What is the main benefit of SkillXT for merchants?
How do I get started with SkillXT?
Is SkillXT available in my city?
What kind of businesses can join SkillXT?
How secure is my data on SkillXT?

title: SkillXT Platform Architecture & Technology Stack
purpose: To describe the technical architecture and technology stack used in the SkillXT Reward Program platform.
keyTopics: PostgreSQL database with Prisma ORM for data modeling
JWT-based authentication with access and refresh tokens
React frontend for customer and merchant dashboards
File upload handling via Multer for payment screenshots
ExcelJS for report generation and exports

title: User Roles & Permissions in SkillXT
purpose: To explain the three user roles in SkillXT, their permissions, and access levels across the platform.
keyTopics: **super_admin**: Full platform access, merchant/customer management, reward settings, subscriptions, complaints
**customer**: Profile management, points balance, ledger view, redemption, QR code access
**merchant**: Points issuance, redemption, transfer, customer lookup, advertisements, subscription management
Role-based access enforced via middleware authorization
Each role has dedicated dashboard endpoints
JWT tokens include role for authorization checks

title: Customer Login Authentication

keyTopics: POST /api/auth/login endpoint accepts mobile or email
User must be active (isActive=true) to login
Failed login attempts logged to audit trail
Refresh token rotation on each use
All refresh tokens invalidated on password change

title: OTP Verification System
purpose: To explain the OTP-based verification system used for registration, login, and profile updates.
keyTopics: OTP records deleted immediately after successful verification

Production mode sends OTP via email only
No SMS gateway integration in current implementation
OTP expiration handled via expiresAt field

title: Password Management & Reset
purpose: To explain password management, change, and reset functionality for user accounts.
keyTopics: All refresh tokens revoked on password change
Generic message to prevent account enumeration
Password hashed with bcrypt before storage
Admin can reset any customer password
Admin reset also revokes all user tokens

title: Platform Security & Data Protection
purpose: To outline the security measures implemented in the SkillXT platform to protect user data.
keyTopics: Passwords hashed with bcrypt before storage
JWT secret required for server startup
Refresh token hashed lookup with reuse detection
All user tokens revoked on suspicious reuse
Audit logging for all critical actions
No sensitive data in error responses

title: Database Models & Schema
purpose: To provide an overview of the core database models used in the SkillXT platform.
keyTopics: User model: Base auth table with mobile, email, password, role
Customer model: Profile, QR code, referral code, preferences
Merchant model: Business info, wallet balance, status, subscription
Transaction model: Earning, redemption, transfer, reversal records
PointsLedger model: Balance tracking with expiry dates
MerchantSubscription model: Plan subscriptions with status
OTPVerification and OTPAttempt for OTP management
